name: Potato Skin Snack
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Salt-free herbs and seasoning blend (regular or spicy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake potatoes at 400°F for 1 hour or until done. Allow potatoes to cool.
2. Cut potatoes in half lengthwise; carefully scoop out pulp, leaving a 1/4-inch lining in shell.
3. Cut shells into 5 strips. Place strips skin side down on a baking sheet.
4. Brush with dressing; sprinkle with seasoning blend.
5. Broil 6 inches from heat for 5 minutes or until browned.
6. Serve warm. (11 calories each.)
